positive: Symmetrical, highly detailed mystical celestial compass design. A central, stylized crescent moon merges with delicate, engraved floral patterns and geometric constellation lines. Incorporate deep sapphire blues, cosmic teal, and metallic gold accents against a dark, matte background. The composition must feature clean, crisp silhouettes and linework, resembling a complex etching or stained glass window, designed to be scalable for apparel printing. Emphasis on high contrast, negative space, and intricate natural-meets-astronomical motifs. Style of ornate decorative engraving and zentangle art. Central composition, perfect for a chest print.
negative: low resolution, bad anatomy, distorted, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, poorly drawn, extra limbs, messy, jpeg artifacts, gradient, simple gradients
